syncLoginQrCameraBusy: The camera is being used by another app. Close it and try again.
syncLoginQrNoCamera: No camera was found on this device. You can sign in manually with your username and secret instead.
syncLoginQrNoMediaDevices: This context cannot access the camera. Open the app over HTTPS (or in the desktop build) and try again.
syncLoginQrPermissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Allow it in your browser/OS settings, then tap “Try camera again”.
syncLoginScanQrAllowCameraBody: To read the QR we need camera access. Tap the button below; your browser will ask for permission.
